name: Aora
description: Developer of home and office services applications designed to solve everyone's day-to-day life problems. The company's application provides professional services such as masonry, locksmith, technology and cleaning alternatives, appliance installation, maintenance and repairs, enabling users to get their specific service needs and requirements fulfilled.

name: Koltin
description: Operator of a digital health platform intended to provide insurance and preventative care services to seniors in Mexico. The company's platform specializes in providing health plans, and remote support service that includes accident insurance, medical emergencies, insurance for major medical expenses, and unlimited preventive advice by specialists, enabling the elderly to enjoy their independence for longer while maintaining their physical and mental abilities.

name: Loopay
description: Developer of a financial technology designed to accelerate the growth of small and mid-size enterprises by strengthening cash flow. The company's technology offers accounting systems adaptable to any file upload, access to reports and integrations to have control of the operation, payment dispersion related to banked and unbanked personnel, accounting reconciliation, and payment process optimization, enabling small and mid-size enterprises to cover advances and balances, account by account and focus on getting more customers without financial limitations.

name: Nuevo Método
description: Developer of a monthly subscription solution Platform intended to help women purchase contraceptives and access medical consultations in a simple and affordable way. The company's platform provides advice on sexual and reproductive health, and medical evaluation and offers contraceptive methods and pills at home, enabling women to eradicate unwanted pregnancies and reduce the occurrence of sexually transmitted diseases.

name: Qubit Smart Tickets
description: Developer of blockchain-based event ticket system designed for companies dedicated to artistic entertainment and recreation activities. The company's system offers features such as anti-fraud security, frictionless mobile transfers, resale control, and a unique ability to generate new revenue and communication opportunities, enabling large companies and SMEs dedicated to artistic entertainment and recreation activities to control, display and manage smart digital tickets, generating trust and maximizing the transactional experience.

name: Scorce
description: Developer of API tools designed to analyze compliance, obtain finance data, validate personal data, digital onboarding, fraud prevention, credit scoring, and alternative data. The company's tools perform rapid risk assessments of potential clients or users and analyze multiple factors by creating a score based on the risk associated with that particular e-mail, enabling customers to borrow loans by preventing fraud and chargebacks.
